reference: My son played basketball last night and hurt his pinky finger. It is swollen all around and has a little purple color almost at the first line from the tip. He is able to move it a little but it hurts him; the pain is about a five. He took two hundred milligrams of Advil for the pain and iced it last night. I want to know if the purple color is due to a fractured bone or if it is just a sprain. Should I take him to the emergency room?
text: My son played basketball last night and hurt his pinky finger. It is swollen all around and has a little purple color almost at the first line from the tip. He is able to move it a little, but it hurts him. The pain is about a 5. He took 200 mg of Advil for the pain and iced it last night. I want to know if the purple color is due to a fractured bone or if it is just a sprain. Should I take him to the emergency room?
